priority.when: Always use to run git status and git diff before committing
priority.why: Ensures user reviews all changes before writing a commit message

priority.when: Prompt user for commit message after showing status/diff
priority.why: Ensures user provides a descriptive message

best_practices.practice: Run git status and git diff before every commit
Show output to user for review
Only proceed to commit after user confirmation
Check if commit message ends with "الحمدالله"
If not, append it (with newline if multiline)
